manifest.name: Topoboardgame local strategy notes
manifest.license: User-authored derived feature notes for this repository.
manifest.notes: Compact feature rules only; do not paste copyrighted strategy article text here.

rules.description: For graph and topology Jump boards, evaluate progress by shortest-path distance to assigned target camps, future jump-chain potential, lane congestion, and target-camp unblocking.
For three-player and multi-agent Jump, score each robot independently against its assigned target camp and use MaxN-style utility rather than assuming a single opposite color.

On torus, sphere, 3D, 4D, and lattice boards, opening camps must be evaluated by symmetric target distance and lane congestion. Avoid overusing one narrow tunnel when multiple equivalent graph lanes exist.

Endgames on topology boards should preserve legal graph paths and target-camp entry order; a move that appears closer in projection is bad if it blocks the only jump ladder into the marked target region.

decisionStack: endgame: graph-distance race, goal blocking, and jump-chain heuristic
